uplink.description: TERPM report-data frame (0x0B, subtype 0x3, type 0x00) with trailing battery byte. Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by running the upstream Apache-2.0 reference decoder (decoder-environmental.js parseTERPM) on this input and normalizing: +27.40 C, 35.5 %RH, 1004.48 hPa, PM1 10, PM2.5 25, PM10 42 ug/m3, battery 88 %, timestamp 2016-09-23 15:54:56.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data computed via the ORACLE method (ran reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM, then mapped to normalized keys: temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, pressure->air.pressure(hPa, atmospheric), pm1/pm25/pm10->extras pm1/pm2_5/pm10, battery%->batteryPercent).

uplink.description: TERPM frame with no trailing battery byte (19 bytes), negative temperature and a low-but-atmospheric pressure. Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by the upstream reference decoder: -5.00 C, 80 %RH, 980.00 hPa, PM1 500, PM2.5 600, PM10 700 ug/m3, no battery.
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data computed via the ORACLE method (ran reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM). Exercises the optional-battery omission and two's-complement negative temperature.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (0xFF) is rejected. Upstream returns its generic 'Error on decoding payload'; we author a specific message.
0x0B report-data frame with a non-TERPM subtype (0x2 weather/PM) is rejected by this device's codec.
